title.desktop: Two-minute brushing. Perfect tempo. Better vibes.

subtitle.withBpm: {{label}}: {{bpm}} BPM target, {{secondsPerTooth}}s per tooth face, {{transitionSeconds}}s transitions, {{ageText}}.
subtitle.withoutBpm: Matching brushing rhythm to music for {{description}}.

backendStatus.waking: Waking up the backend. The first request should take no more than 30 seconds, so please hang on.
backendStatus.connecting: Still connecting to the backend. This is taking longer than expected, but it should finish shortly.

brushing.title: Brushing
brushing.description: Tempo-matched brushing, music, and guided hand positioning.

flossing.title: Flossing
flossing.description: Floss once daily by hugging each tooth in a C-shape, sliding below the gumline, and using clean floss sections between teeth.

waterPicking.title: Water Picking
waterPicking.description: Use a warm-water irrigator at low to medium pressure, trace the gumline at 90 degrees, and pause between teeth for 1-2 seconds.

app.languageFallbackNotice: This language is not available yet. Showing English.

lastSession.summary: Last session: {{title}} by {{artist}}, {{top}} top teeth, {{bottom}} bottom teeth, {{duration}} brush time.

app.success: Great work, your {{duration}} clean is complete. Keep this habit daily for stronger teeth and healthier gums.

history.title: Recent Updates
history.intro: Recent GitHub pushes and git commits with dates and the main change in each entry.

supportedLanguage.label: Choose a supported language
supportedLanguage.hint: Your browser is set to {{requestedLanguage}}. BrushBeats currently supports English, Spanish, and Turkish, so choose which supported language to use on this device.

languageSimulator.label: Browser language simulator
languageSimulator.hint: Overrides navigator language for testing fallback behavior. Query string ?lng= still takes priority.

settings.topBottomIntroMobile: Set top and bottom teeth count. BrushBeats infers who is brushing from the tooth count.
settings.topBottomIntroDesktop: Enter how many teeth are on the top and bottom. BrushBeats infers who is brushing from the tooth count and adjusts timing automatically.
settings.searchBpmDetails: {{secondsPerTooth}}s per tooth face, {{transitions}} transitions at {{transitionSeconds}}s each
settings.searchBpmFallback: Timing includes tooth brushing plus transition buffers inside the same {{minutes}}-minute session
settings.toothRangeHint: Per row of teeth, from no erupted teeth to a full 16-tooth arch
settings.formNote: These sliders represent actual teeth, not brushing speed. Younger mouths automatically get longer transition buffers between side and surface changes.
settings.headlineCalculated: {{totalTeeth}} teeth fit {{toothTime}}s of brushing and {{transitionTime}}s of transitions into {{minutes}} minutes.
settings.headlineEmpty: Adjust teeth counts to calculate BPM.
settings.nextStepDescription: Use this detected stage and tempo target to queue songs that fit the brusher naturally.

music.introDesktop: Find tracks near your target BPM using GetSongBPM + optional keyword filters.
music.introMobile: Find tracks near your target BPM.
music.noteDesktop: Use regenerate to pull a fresh set at the same BPM range and discover different artists.
music.randomFiltersNote: Danceability and acousticness start at random values each time the page loads.
music.detectedStageNote: Detected stage: {{label}}. Music picks also drift with the typical tooth count for that stage.
music.empty: No songs found at this BPM range yet.
music.exhausted: You've already seen all songs in this current pool. Change keyword/tolerance or regenerate again for a fresh pool.

player.introDesktop: Pick a song and play it inside the app with YouTube iframe embed.
player.selectSong: Select a song to start playback.
player.noEmbed: Could not find an embeddable video for {{title}}.
player.runningStatus: Brushing controls keep the video and brushing guide in sync when you pause or resume.

brushing.controlsIntro: Wait until any ads are played or skipped, then start brushing so the timing stays aligned.
brushing.durationHint: Default is 2:00. Change it before starting if this brusher needs more or less time.
brushing.resetConfirm: Press OK to reset only the brushing timer and keep the current song position. Press Cancel to restart both the song and brushing timer from the beginning.
brushing.resetConfirmRestartSuggested: Only {{remaining}} of the song is left. Press OK to reset only the brushing timer and keep the current song position. Press Cancel to restart both the song and brushing timer from the beginning.
brushing.timerNote: Timer and guide run independently from YouTube controls, but the pacing is recalculated for the selected brush time.
brushing.readyDetail: Brush with your {{hand}} hand and follow the guide once playback is ready.

errors.needsTeeth: Enter at least one tooth before starting a brushing session.
errors.needsPlayback: Start playback first, then press Start Brushing to begin only the brush timer and guide.
errors.songMayEndEarly: Only {{remaining}} of the song is left, so you may want to restart the track for a full brush.

guide.title: Brush Map
guide.introMobile: Follow the marker tooth-by-tooth. Transition buffers are built into the same {{minutes}}-minute session.
guide.introDesktop: Brush all tooth surfaces evenly for the full {{minutes}}-minute brushing time. Hold the bristles at a 45-degree angle toward the gumline and use gentle motions to clean away from the gums, ensuring each quadrant is covered without extending the recommended brushing time.
guide.countdownCallout: Get your brush in position. Brushing starts in {{seconds}}s.
guide.transitionOrientation: Switching toward {{toLabel}}. Reorient your hand before the next strokes.
guide.activeOrientation: Animated brush tracks {{label}} and shows the gum-away stroke for that quadrant.
guide.idleOrientation: Align your {{hand}} hand to the highlighted quadrant, then start the session.
guide.activeCurrentCallout: Brush {{label}} now on {{toothLabel}}, tooth {{position}} of {{size}}. Move in {{seconds}}s.
guide.handOrientationCompact: Use your {{hand}} hand and point the brush toward the {{direction}} side.
guide.transitionCallout: Transition from {{fromLabel}} to {{toLabel}}. Resume brushing in {{seconds}}s.
guide.activeCalloutDesktop: Brush {{label}} now, tooth {{position}} of {{size}}. Song target is ~{{bpm}} BPM. Move in {{seconds}}s.{{transitionNotice}}
guide.pausedCallout: Paused. Tap Resume to continue from the same spot.
guide.awaitingPlaybackCallout: Waiting for ads to finish or be skipped. Brushing will start once the song begins.
guide.inactiveCallout: Press Start Brushing to begin live tooth guidance.

cue.completeDetail: All sections are done. Restart when you are ready for another pass.
cue.countdownDetail: Move into position. Brushing starts in {{seconds}}s.
cue.pausedDetail: Tap Resume to continue from the same tooth and video position.
cue.awaitingPlaybackDetail: Brushing will start once ads finish or are skipped and the song begins.
cue.readyDetail: Use your {{hand}} hand, wait for any ads to finish or be skipped, then start the timer.
cue.halfwayDetail: Move from the {{fromJaw}} teeth to the {{toJaw}} teeth. Reposition your {{hand}} hand now.
cue.sideSwitchDetail: Move from the {{fromSide}} side to the {{toSide}} side of the mouth. Keep the brush in your {{hand}} hand and adjust your reach.
cue.switchHandDetail: Switch your {{hand}} hand grip now and get ready for the next section.
cue.rotateDetail: Rotate the brush angle and continue with gentle strokes.
cue.activeDetail: Tooth {{position}} of {{size}}. Keep the brush in your {{hand}} hand and move in {{seconds}}s.

motions.top: Brush down away from the gums
motions.bottom: Brush up away from the gums

privacy.analyticsMessage: Help improve BrushBeats by sharing anonymous usage analytics. We never send typed text or personal data.
privacy.storageMessage: BrushBeats can store your last session in browser storage (cookies/localStorage) so you can quickly repeat the same brushing setup next time.
privacy.modalBody1: BrushBeats uses Google Analytics 4 only when you opt in. We collect anonymous usage events to improve the app, such as BPM calculations, song selections, brushing starts, resets, completions, and auto-queue transitions.
privacy.modalBody2: We may also store your last brushing session in browser storage (cookies/localStorage) only when you allow storage. This lets you quickly restore the same song, tooth counts, filters, brushing hand, and duration on your next visit.
privacy.modalBody3: We do not send typed form text, email addresses, names, passwords, or payment information. Ad-related storage is disabled unless required for core analytics consented by you.
privacy.modalBody4: Your analytics choice is stored on this device and you can change it at any time using the Analytics controls in the footer.
privacy.storageModalBody1: When you allow storage, BrushBeats saves data only in your browser using cookies and localStorage so your setup can be restored on a later visit.
privacy.storageModalBody2: That stored data can include your tooth counts, song discovery filters, keyword search, selected brushing hand, selected brush duration, and the last song you started brushing with.
privacy.storageModalBody3: The storage also keeps the last session summary so Repeat Last Session can restore the song, teeth setup, filters, hand preference, and brush duration more quickly.
privacy.storageModalBody4: This information stays on your device, is not collected by the service, is not a login system, and is only stored locally to provide a more seamless interface. You can clear it at any time by turning storage off in the footer controls.

errors.backendTimeout: The backend is still waking up. Please wait a few seconds and try again.
errors.backendUnavailable: Waking up my music brain. If the service is cold-starting, please wait a few seconds and retry.
errors.languageFallbackNotice: This language is not available yet. Showing English.
